rationale: Review 1 has a real reuse finding: the general `BialgHom.map_antipode` and tensor-product `map_id`/`map_comp` helpers are proven in the diff but hidden as `private`, so exposing them would make downstream Tau Ceti code better able to reuse the work. Some duplicate-specialization complaints are more contested because base-change-specific simp lemmas can be useful API, but the private-helper issue is material enough to beat Review 2's blanket approval.
